trigger.name: second-brain-daily-briefing
trigger.timezone_note: Cron is UTC. 11:45 UTC = 6:45 AM CDT (America/Chicago). Adjust for DST: CDT=UTC-5, CST=UTC-6.
trigger.prompt: You are running the second-brain daily briefing. Read CLAUDE.md first. Then run the /today command by executing: node -e "require('./src/today-command').runToday({ mode: 'scheduled' }).then(r => console.log(r.briefing || r.error))". Report the output.

dst_ops.description: RemoteTrigger uses UTC cron. Adjust schedule twice yearly for US Central time.
dst_ops.cdt_note: CDT (UTC-5): 11:45 UTC = 6:45 AM CDT. Active ~Mar second Sun to Nov first Sun.
dst_ops.cst_note: CST (UTC-6): 12:45 UTC = 6:45 AM CST. Active ~Nov first Sun to Mar second Sun.
dst_ops.action: Update trigger.schedule value and re-create the RemoteTrigger with the new cron expression. Use: RemoteTrigger update trig_01KvxeDfYDAEwAzw9zw9DKKB with new cron_expression.

fallback_chain: RemoteTrigger (primary — server-side cron, no local machine needed)
macOS launchd (tertiary — system-level, requires plist management)
